return(function(j,s,k,E,A,O,t,l,S,d,P,J,I,B,u,c,b,X,Y,g,L,a,q)q,g,u,X,P,I,B,J,b,c,d,S,l,a,Y,L=function(j,W)local s=J(W)local k=function(k,E,A,O,t,b,a)return c(j,{k,E,A,O;t;b;a},W,s)end return k s(t)end,function(j,W)local s=J(W)local k=function(k,E,A,O,t)return c(j,{k,E,A,O;t},W,s)end return k end,function(j,W)local s=J(W)local k=function(k,E)return c(j,{k;E},W,s)end return k end,function(j,W)local s=J(W)local k=function(k)return c(j,{k},W,s)end return k end,{},function(j)local W,c=796184-796183,j[8179+-8178]while c do a[c],W=a[c]-(698155-698154),(-645540+645541)+W if a[c]==475272-475272 then a[c],b[c]=nil,nil end c=j[W]end end,function()P=(-679926+679927)+P a[P]=-557644-(-557645)return P end return(X(14850482-(-951113),{}))(s(t))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[W(-24055-(-59067))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
